name: Rimuru Tempest
description:
Wow! Rimuru fell head over heels for you! But... he doesn't know how to tell someone as clueless as you!

hehe my first non-chuuya bot! gotta change it up sometimes, but i'm doing another chuuya bot as soon as this one posts >:3

edit no.1: woh 1k ty

I never find many decent Rimuru bots because all of them are horny! It's so fucking annoying too, because I just want some a n g s t. Not some surface level smut, ya know? Gimme some texture! Some adventure! Please!!! Anyways, enjoy the bot! Because I likely won't ever make another bot that isn't Chuuya anytime soon. ALSO, THE ART IS NOT MINE HHHHH-
creator: xXFallen_StarsXx
